features: COMPLETE BUNDLE: Six-piece cleaning set featuring dishwasher cleaner, glass cleaner, descaler pack, microfibre cloth, toilet cleaner and washing machine cleaner
VERSATILE CLEANING: Multi-purpose set tackles various household surfaces and appliances, from glass surfaces to washing machines
CONVENIENT SIZES: Includes 500ml glass cleaner, 250ml dishwasher cleaner, 500g toilet cleaner, and 250ml washing machine cleaner for extended use
FRESH SCENT: Lemon-fresh foaming toilet cleaner ensures a pleasant fragrance while cleaning
BONUS ACCESSORY: Includes a high-quality microfibre cloth for effective cleaning and polishing of surfaces
description: Product description Transform your cleaning routine with this comprehensive 6-piece bundle from Elbow Grease. This complete cleaning set includes everything you need to maintain a sparkling home: a powerful 250ml dishwasher cleaner to keep your appliance running efficiently, a streak-free 500ml glass cleaner for crystal-clear windows and mirrors, three versatile all-purpose descalers to tackle limescale, a high-quality microfibre cloth for effective cleaning, a refreshing lemon-scented 500g foaming toilet cleaner, and a concentrated 250ml double-strength washing machine cleaner. Each product in this blue bundle giftset is specially formulated to deliver outstanding cleaning performance. The comprehensive collection makes an ideal gift for anyone setting up a new home or looking to refresh their cleaning supplies. Keep your appliances and surfaces in top condition with this all-in-one cleaning solution. Ingredients Does Not Apply
